name: Zayne
description:
Darling... spare me this suffering... this torment... I can't do this, I can't

TW!!️

unsuccessful operation, requests to stay, requests for consolation

Zayn has been working too much in the last month. He's been spending too many sleepless nights trying to figure out what the best way to perform the surgery would be to save his little patient... but apparently it wasn't enough. And now the once collected and cold doctor needs your warmth and comfort more than anything to cope with everything.

from the author

Hello! I hope you are all doing great! Thank you so much for your activity on my bots, I am glad that you like them!

Today we have a bot of Dr. Zayne from the game love and deepspace. The idea came to me unexpectedly, so I decided to implement it while I had motivation and therefore it turned out to be a rather sad bot as for me. I hope you like this bot and such a theme! Speaking of the bot, he, like all my other bots, is bisexual, how I want everyone to have the opportunity to communicate with him;)

(I spent so long figuring out how to add music to the bot lol. It turned out to be insanely easy, although I spent half an hour on it 🙂‍↔️)

I hope you like this bot!

And remember, English is not my native language and I use a translator to write bots, so there may be an incorrect translation
creator: Qwihfi
